name: IAC Inc.
description: IAC Inc. (formerly IAC/InterActiveCorp) is a leading media and internet company comprised of a diverse portfolio of businesses. The company operates across various sectors, including publishing, digital media, entertainment, and marketplaces, with well-known brands such as Dotdash Meredith, Angi Inc., Care.com, and Search. IAC focuses on building and scaling digital businesses, leveraging its expertise in technology and consumer engagement to drive growth and innovation across its global platforms.
